title: Microsoft Just Shocked The Entire AI World: 7 New AI Models
summary: Microsoft has released seven new in-house AI models including MAI-Thinking-1, Scout, Codename MDASH, and Majorana 2, positioning itself as both partner and competitor to OpenAI. The video argues that Microsoft is building a full-stack AI platform spanning models, agents, quantum hardware, and developer tools to control more of the AI ecosystem.
